Retrieve the transaction record with the merchant reference number.
ECRRefNum - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
The ECR reference number, it is echo back from request.

EMVTLVData - Class in com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration
This is used to communicate with POS Service to get/set EMV TLV data.
Only supports Full Integration app (P2PE or TermLink)

EndTap - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTap

1 - End tap if error

0 --- Normal flow
1 --- Stop tap session

eWIC card expiry Date, format is YYYYMMDD.
EwicDetail - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse.PaymentTransInfo

ExpiryDate - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
The token’s expiration date.
ExpiryDate - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
The expiration date for manual entry in format of MMYY.
ExpiryDate - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.Original
Expiry date in MMYY of account number for original transaction.
Conditional for matching card on terminal in subsequent transactions after SALE, i.e.
ExpiryDatePrompt - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Flag indicates whether expiry date needs to be prompted during manual * entry.

ExtData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchResponse

ExtData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest

ExtData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse

ExtData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest

ExtData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse
Catch all for additional transaction information
ExtData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportRequest
Extended data in XML format
ExtData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
Catch all for additional transactional information.
See ReportResponse ExtData for definition.

ExtendedCount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse

ExternalClass - Class in com.pax.poslink
To register an external class for supporting POSLink on different platform, For example, register UART jar on casio device to support serial port, This class is for loading some externalclassesfor some specific platforms.
ExternalClass(ClassLoader, ExternalClass.CLASSTYPE) - Constructor for class com.pax.poslink.ExternalClass
construction method
ExternalClass.CLASSTYPE - Enum in com.pax.poslink
indicate the Class type

ExtraBalance - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
